requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Frequency Performance (DSTU EN harmonised standards, DSSU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——无线电频率性能（DSTU EN协调标准，DSSU）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——無線電頻率性能（DSTU EN協調標準，DSSU）

summary.en: Ukraine progressively adopts EU ETSI standards as DSTU EN (State Standards of Ukraine) through DSSU (State Standard of Ukraine body) and Ukrmetrteststandard, as part of its EU Association Agreement commitments. Radio frequency performance testing for 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth equipment references DSTU EN 300 328; 5 GHz Wi-Fi references DSTU EN 301 893. NKRZI manages spectrum in alignment with EU radio frequency decisions. EU/ETSI-aligned EN test reports are accepted by NKRZI as the technical basis for the conformity declaration, significantly reducing re-testing burden for products already CE-tested. Products without prior EN testing must commission fresh DSTU EN-basis tests from an accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 乌克兰依据欧盟联系协定承诺，通过DSSU（乌克兰国家标准化机构）和Ukrmetrteststandard，逐步将欧盟ETSI标准采纳为DSTU EN（乌克兰国家标准）。2.4GHz Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备的射频性能测试参照DSTU EN 300 328；5GHz Wi-Fi参照DSTU EN 301 893。NKRZI依据欧盟无线电频率决策进行频谱管理。NKRZI接受符合欧盟/ETSI的EN检测报告作为符合性声明的技术依据，显著降低已完成CE测试产品的重复测试负担。未完成EN测试的产品须委托经认可实验室进行新的DSTU EN依据测试。
summary.zht: 烏克蘭依據歐盟聯繫協定承諾，通過DSSU（烏克蘭國家標準化機構）和Ukrmetrteststandard，逐步將歐盟ETSI標準採納為DSTU EN（烏克蘭國家標準）。2.4GHz Wi-Fi和藍牙設備的射頻性能測試參照DSTU EN 300 328；5GHz Wi-Fi參照DSTU EN 301 893。NKRZI依據歐盟無線電頻率決策進行頻譜管理。NKRZI接受符合歐盟/ETSI的EN測試報告作為符合性聲明的技術依據，顯著降低已完成CE測試產品的重複測試負擔。未完成EN測試的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行新的DSTU EN依據測試。

standards_or_laws: DSTU EN 300 328 V2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; 2.4 GHz ISM band (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
DSTU EN 301 893 V2.1.1 — 5 GHz high-performance RLAN (Wi-Fi 5/6)
DSTU EN 300 440 — Short range devices (SRD, IoT sub-GHz bands)
DSTU EN 301 511 / DSTU EN 301 908-1 — GSM / LTE cellular
DSSU (State Standard of Ukraine) — DSTU standards catalogue
Ukraine-EU Association Agreement (in force 2017) — technical harmonisation with ETSI/EN

summary.en: China's SRRC radio type approval process applies MIIT-mandated technical requirements based on YD/T and GB standards for frequency performance. These are not harmonised with ETSI/EN standards. SRRC approval covers frequency, modulation, and transmitter power requirements specific to China's allocated spectrum and is not accepted by NKRZI.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式核准流程基于工业和信息化部规定的技术要求，采用YD/T和GB标准进行频率性能测试，与ETSI/EN标准不协调。SRRC核准涵盖中国分配频谱特有的频率、调制及发射功率要求，不被NKRZI接受。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式核准流程基於工業和信息化部規定的技術要求，採用YD/T和GB標準進行頻率性能測試，與ETSI/EN標準不協調。SRRC核准涵蓋中國分配頻譜特有的頻率、調製及發射功率要求，不被NKRZI接受。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准
MIIT spectrum management regulations (frequency allocation table)

gap.en: SRRC approval and GB/YD radio performance test data are not accepted by NKRZI in place of DSTU EN-based reports. If the product already holds CE marking with EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports, NKRZI accepts these as technical evidence for the conformity declaration, substantially reducing re-testing costs. Without prior CE testing, new DSTU EN-basis radio performance tests must be commissioned from an accredited laboratory. The NKRZI conformity declaration remains a separate mandatory step even when EN test reports are reused.
gap.zh: SRRC核准及GB/YD无线电性能测试数据不被NKRZI接受以替代DSTU EN依据报告。若产品已持有CE标志并附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893检测报告，NKRZI接受这些报告作为符合性声明的技术证明，可显著降低重新测试成本。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行新的DSTU EN依据射频性能测试。即使EN检测报告被复用，NKRZI符合性声明仍为单独的强制步骤。
gap.zht: SRRC核准及GB/YD無線電性能測試數據不被NKRZI接受以替代DSTU EN依據報告。若產品已持有CE標誌並附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893測試報告，NKRZI接受這些報告作為符合性聲明的技術證明，可顯著降低重新測試成本。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行新的DSTU EN依據射頻性能測試。即使EN測試報告被複用，NKRZI符合性聲明仍為單獨的強制步驟。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RF performance testing to DSTU EN standards is mandatory as the technical basis for the NKRZI conformity declaration in Ukraine. SRRC approval and GB/YD test reports are not accepted. Existing EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 CE test reports are generally reusable as technical evidence for the NKRZI declaration, reducing costs; confirm report format and accreditation scope acceptance with NKRZI or a qualified local representative before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按DSTU EN标准进行的射频性能测试是乌克兰NKRZI符合性声明技术依据的强制要求。SRRC核准及GB/YD检测报告不被接受。现有的EN 300 328/EN 301 893 CE测试报告通常可作为NKRZI声明的技术证明复用，以降低成本；提交前请向NKRZI或合格本地代表确认报告格式和认可范围是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按DSTU EN標準進行的射頻性能測試是烏克蘭NKRZI符合性聲明技術依據的強制要求。SRRC核准及GB/YD測試報告不被接受。現有的EN 300 328/EN 301 893 CE測試報告通常可作為NKRZI聲明的技術證明複用，以降低成本；提交前請向NKRZI或合格本地代表確認報告格式和認可範圍是否被接受。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions (DSTU EN 301 489, DSSU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——传导与辐射骚扰（DSTU EN 301 489，DSSU）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——傳導與輻射騷擾（DSTU EN 301 489，DSSU）

summary.en: EMC requirements for conducted and radiated disturbance emissions from radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment in Ukraine are based on DSTU EN 301 489-1 (general EMC requirements for radio equipment) and product-specific DSTU EN 301 489-x companion standards, as adopted by DSSU. These standards mirror the EU EN 301 489 series. Compliance with DSTU EN 301 489 is required as part of the NKRZI conformity declaration application. EN 301 489-series test reports from CE certification are generally accepted by NKRZI as technical evidence.
summary.zh: 乌克兰无线电设备和电信终端设备的传导与辐射骚扰电磁兼容要求，基于DSSU采用的DSTU EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用电磁兼容要求）及产品专用DSTU EN 301 489-x配套标准。这些标准与欧盟EN 301 489系列保持一致，须作为NKRZI符合性声明申请的一部分进行符合性验证。来自CE认证的EN 301 489系列检测报告通常被NKRZI接受作为技术证明。
summary.zht: 烏克蘭無線電設備和電信終端設備的傳導與輻射騷擾電磁相容要求，基於DSSU採用的DSTU EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用電磁相容要求）及產品專用DSTU EN 301 489-x配套標準。這些標準與歐盟EN 301 489系列保持一致，須作為NKRZI符合性聲明申請的一部分進行符合性驗證。來自CE認證的EN 301 489系列測試報告通常被NKRZI接受作為技術證明。

standards_or_laws: DSTU EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 — EMC standard for radio equipment; Part 1: Common technical requirements
DSTU EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4 — EMC specific conditions for wideband data and HIPERLAN equipment (Wi-Fi / BT)
DSTU EN 301 489-52 — Cellular / LTE terminal equipment
DSSU (State Standard of Ukraine) — DSTU standards catalogue

summary.en: China applies GB/T 9254.1-2021 for radiated and conducted emissions from information technology and telecom equipment, and GB 17625.1-2022 for harmonic current emissions. These are mandatory national standards distinct from and not interchangeable with the DSTU EN 301 489 series. GB EMC test reports are not accepted by NKRZI.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术和电信设备的辐射与传导骚扰适用GB/T 9254.1-2021，对谐波电流骚扰适用GB 17625.1-2022，均为强制性国家标准，与DSTU EN 301 489系列不同且不可互换。GB电磁兼容检测报告不被NKRZI接受。
summary.zht: 中國對信息技術和電信設備的輻射與傳導騷擾適用GB/T 9254.1-2021，對諧波電流騷擾適用GB 17625.1-2022，均為強制性國家標準，與DSTU EN 301 489系列不同且不可互換。GB電磁相容測試報告不被NKRZI接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics (IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: GB/T 9254 and GB 17625 test data are not accepted by NKRZI in place of DSTU EN 301 489 series reports. If the product already has CE-compliant EN 301 489-1 / EN 301 489-17 test reports, NKRZI generally accepts these as technical evidence for the conformity declaration. Without prior CE testing, new DSTU EN 301 489 tests must be commissioned from an accredited laboratory. The EN 301 489 series measures different disturbance limits and test methods compared with GB/T 9254, so results are not directly transferable.
gap.zh: GB/T 9254和GB 17625测试数据不被NKRZI接受以替代DSTU EN 301 489系列报告。若产品已持有符合CE的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17检测报告，NKRZI通常接受这些报告作为符合性声明的技术证明。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行新的DSTU EN 301 489测试。EN 301 489系列与GB/T 9254在骚扰限值和测试方法上存在差异，结果不可直接转用。
gap.zht: GB/T 9254和GB 17625測試數據不被NKRZI接受以替代DSTU EN 301 489系列報告。若產品已持有符合CE的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17測試報告，NKRZI通常接受這些報告作為符合性聲明的技術證明。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行新的DSTU EN 301 489測試。EN 301 489系列與GB/T 9254在騷擾限值和測試方法上存在差異，結果不可直接轉用。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DSTU EN 301 489-series EMC compliance is mandatory as technical evidence for the NKRZI conformity declaration in Ukraine. GB/T 9254 or GB 17625 test reports are not accepted. Existing EN 301 489 CE test reports can typically be reused as technical evidence for NKRZI applications, reducing costs; confirm format and scope acceptance with NKRZI or a qualified local representative before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DSTU EN 301 489系列电磁兼容合规性是乌克兰NKRZI符合性声明技术证明的强制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625检测报告不被接受。现有的EN 301 489 CE测试报告通常可作为NKRZI申请的技术证明复用以降低成本；提交前请向NKRZI或合格本地代表确认格式和范围是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DSTU EN 301 489系列電磁相容合規性是烏克蘭NKRZI符合性聲明技術證明的強制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625測試報告不被接受。現有的EN 301 489 CE測試報告通常可作為NKRZI申請的技術證明複用以降低成本；提交前請向NKRZI或合格本地代表確認格式和範圍是否被接受。
